title: Duke Inuarashi and Master Nekomamushi
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on duke inuarashi and master nekomamushi within the Duke Inuarashi and Master Nekomamushi storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Lord Sicilian, this is "The Straw hat Crew"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I give you my deepest thanks for saving our country!! We are forever indebted to you all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Lord Sicilian tends to go... All-out in everything he does.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He's a bit of a stick-in- the-mud...

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: The Duke awaits inside!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Yes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Now, come forth!!This is not the time to be dilly- dallying!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's Luffy and the others!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: So you lot...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Are "the straw hat crew"?

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: Duke, thank goodness you're safe!

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: Mokomo Dukedom "King of Day" DUKE INUARASHI

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You all really did us an incredible favor...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Words cannot express my gratitude.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Apparently my friends saved you guys,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: But I still haven't heard the whole story.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Actually ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I was talking to all of you... including you, "Straw hat Luffy".

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: --But old man, you must be super strong...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You sure look pretty strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: Hold your tongue!! The Duke is this country's strongest warrior!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Now, now... that's not something you can say about the defeated...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ..... Fufu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: defeated?! It's true that our enemy was a troublesome one...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: But we had the upper hand in battle!!!

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: If only Jack hadn't brought such a weapon into our country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...!! hm...? weapon?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: -Yeah, that's right, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The weapon that destroyed this country ...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Was Caesar's "poison gas weapon"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...ch. Bob / end

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: A shocking revelation! What on earth happened on you......!!?

summary: Duke Inuarashi and Master Nekomamushi: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
